content.problemStatement:
You have RRR red gems, BBB blue gems and GGG green gems. Each gem normally sells for 333 coins.

However, if you make a bundle of 111 red gem, 111 blue gem and 111 green gem; you can sell it for 101010 coins instead.

What is the maximum number of coins you can earn?


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
The first and only line of input contains 333 integers - RRR, BBB and GGG.


Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the maximum number of coins you can earn.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: You make exactly 111 bundle which sells for 101010 coins.
Test case 222: Since you have no red gems, you cannot make any bundle. So, you sell all the 202020 gems separately for 20⋅3=6020 \cdot 3 = 6020⋅3=60 coins.
